meta.title: KLASSCI College, complete school management for middle and high schools
meta.description: KLASSCI College brings enrollment, fees, grades, report cards, attendance, timetables and parent spaces into one platform.

hero.title: The whole school, in one platform.
hero.subtitle: Leadership, secretariat, accounting, teachers, parents and students work on a clear platform built for daily school operations.

roles.title: Each account sees exactly what it must handle
roles.intro: KLASSCI College separates responsibilities without fragmenting information. Roles collaborate in the same system with proper permissions.

items.title: Leadership
items.description: Global view of enrollment, finances, attendance, results and official documents.

items.title: Secretariat
items.description: Enrollments, student files, classes, administrative documents and daily requests.

items.title: Accounting
items.description: Collections, receipts, balances, reminders and financial statements by student or class.

items.title: Teachers
items.description: Grades, attendance, timetable and class tracking from mobile or desktop.

items.title: Parents
items.description: Fees, report cards, timetables, documents and useful updates for each child.

items.title: Students
items.description: Simple access to grades, report cards, attendance, payments, timetable and published documents.

modules.title: Every school workflow, without parallel tools
modules.intro: The product covers the flows that cost teams time, from intake to report cards.

items.title: Enrollments
items.description: Student file, class, status, subscribed fees, documents and validation.

items.title: Fees and cashier
items.description: Enrollment-based payments, receipts, remaining balances, history and reminders.

items.title: Grades and reports
items.description: Teacher entry, averages, ranks, report cards and PDF documents.

items.title: Attendance
items.description: Digital roll call, absences, lateness, justifications and class statistics.

items.title: Timetable
items.description: Classroom equals class, teachers move, each actor reads a clear schedule.

items.title: Parents
items.description: Family portal with children, fees, documents, grades and reports.

items.title: Documents
items.description: Certificates, attestations, financial statements and clean exports.

items.title: Leadership
items.description: Dashboards that surface priorities before they become emergencies.

showcase.title: Recent, readable screens shown in real devices
showcase.intro: Recent screenshots show the real school-management screens without added frames, keeping every interface fully readable.

items.title: Live dashboard
items.caption: Current dashboard with blue and orange header, indicators and quick actions.

items.title: Mobile dashboard
items.caption: Indicators and actions stay accessible on phone with the same brand identity.

items.title: Assessments and entry
items.caption: Grade supervision with filters by class, subject and term.

items.title: Parents and accounts
items.caption: Track guardians, login accounts and useful contacts for each family.

items.title: Timetable
items.caption: Generation, preview and PDF export grouped in one clear interface.

quote.title: Every institution receives a tailored quote
quote.text: Pricing depends on school size, required accounts, onboarding support and customization. We qualify the need, then send a clear offer.
